results.title: Roman Trakhov
highlights:
Sr Data Scientist - Enterprise Data Analytics & AI McDonald's
...
Sr Data Scientist - Enterprise Data Analytics & AI at [McDonald's](https://www.linkedin.com/company/mcdonald%27s-corporation)
...
Roman Trakhov is a seasoned Data Scientist with 8+ years of extensive experience in AI, Machine Learning, and Software Development. Currently serving as a Data Scientist at McDonald's, Roman specializes in leveraging advanced analytics to drive strategic decision-making and optimize business operations. Previously, Roman held the position of Chief Data Scientist at McDonald's in Russia, where he led groundbreaking initiatives and spearheaded innovative projects to enhance customer experiences and drive growth in the Russian market. Roman is passionate about harnessing the power of data to drive business success and is known for his expertise in developing cutting-edge AI solutions tailored to meet specific business needs. With a strong background in software development, Roman brings a unique blend of technical skills and business acumen to every project he undertakes. Fluent in both English and Russian, Roman is adept at navigating diverse cultural and linguistic landscapes, enabling seamless collaboration and communication across global teams. Roman resides in Chicago with his wife and enjoys exploring the vibrant city in his free time.

Today I begin a new chapter in my McDonald's career, building the Business Partners team within Enterprise Data, Analytics, and AI (EDAA). This team will serve as the primary connection point between our global functions and EDAA, translating business priorities into data, analytics, and AI solutions that drive decision-making and business impact.
...
It's an honor to build and lead this team at such a pivotal moment for analytics and AI. And there is no better place to spend Day 1 in role than at McDonald's Worldwide Convention, where data, analytics, and AI are coming to life across our business.
...
Seven years ago, I joined McDonald’s and started a Data Science COE from the ground up. At the time, we had no backlog, no headcount, and only a broad mandate to help strengthen analytics practices.
...
On June 1, I’m excited to step into a new role! Taking the experience I've gained at the center and leading enterprise transformation for Advanced Analytics & AI.
...
The focus: modernizing how McDonald’s executes Analytics and AI initiatives across functions and markets. Leveraging our scale, accelerating adoption (not just experimentation), and driving measurable outcomes that move the needle. My aim is to help build a more consistent “One McDonald’s Way” that still respects local context and speed.

results.title: Kevin Truong
highlights:
Senior Manager, Data Engineering Multi-Cloud Databricks dbt BigQuery Data Architecture at [McDonald's](https://www.linkedin.com/company/mcdonald%27s-corporation)
...
I am an AI and data engineering leader with deep experience delivering digital transformation through modern platforms, GenAI systems, and cross-functional engineering teams. My background spans software development, cloud architecture, and technical leadership, with a track record of impactful solutions across manufacturing, banking, healthcare, HR tech, and consumer goods. I specialize in architecting data platforms and AI/ML systems that support analytics, machine learning, and real-time insights. From Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines and LLM integration to observability frameworks and compliance, I focus on building secure, scalable, and value-driven platforms. Initiatives such as Kraft-O-Matic have modernized data operations, improved decision intelligence, and strengthened enterprise collaboration. I connect technical depth with business outcomes by partnering with product leaders, mentoring engineers, and aligning architecture with strategic priorities. As a champion of responsible AI and data governance, I build solutions aligned with GDPR, CCPA, HIPAA, and enterprise policies. As an educator and mentor, I support the next generation of technology professionals through both academic and industry contributions. Focus Areas: - GenAI Systems & LLM Integration - Data Platform Engineering - MLOps & Observability - Platform Security & Compliance - Team Mentorship, Technical Strategy, and Cross-Industry Delivery Technical Expertise: - Programming: Python, Java, JavaScript, Scala, C#, C++, Go, R, SQL, Shell, PL/SQL, PHP, Regex - Cloud & Warehousing: AWS, Azure, GCP, Snowflake, BigQuery, Redshift - Databases: PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQL Server, Oracle, DuckDB, MongoDB, Neo4j, Cassandra, Redis, Memgraph, Neptune, Data Lakes, Hive, HBase - Big Data & Formats: Spark, Kafka, Iceberg, Parquet, ORC, Avro - ETL, BI & Orchestration: dbt, Airflow, Dagster, Databricks, Flink, Power BI, Tableau, Looker - AI/ML & GenAI: LangChain, ChatGPT, Bedrock, Hugging Face, LLMs, LLMOps, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), XGBoost, Random Forest, Logistic Regression, Feature Engineering, MLflow, SageMaker, Scikit-learn - DevOps & Infra: Kubernetes, Docker, CI/CD, Terraform, Jenkins, OpenTelemetry - Frameworks & APIs: FastAPI, Flask, Django, GraphQL, Dask, WebSocket, gRPC, Redis Streams - Governance & Security: GDPR, HIPAA, CCPA, Data Cleanroom, OWASP, NIST SP 800-53, SOX, PII, PHI, FDA, CFR - Collaboration & Delivery: Jira, Confluence, Figma, Miro, Drawio - Developer Tools: Git, GitHub, VS Code, IntelliJ, PyCharm, Maven, Make, Ant

results.title: McDonald’s latest AI drive-thru test will let customers ask, “Can I get my usual?” | The Verge
highlights:
McDonald’s latest AI drive-thru test will let customers ask, “Can I get my usual?” | The Verge
...
McDonald’s latest AI drive-thru test will let customers ask, “Can I get my usual?”
...
Five restaurant locations are piloting the new ArchIQ tech, which puts a chatbot at the drive-thru that appears to identify repeat customers, according to a demo shown at McDonald’s Worldwide Convention last week. The demo also shows the chatbot taking an order in Spanish and “remembering” that a customer doesn’t like cheese on their quarter-pounder.
...
## Chatbots at the drive-thru are just the beginning
...
.theverge.com/column/928096/chatbots-ai-drive-thru-mcdonalds-wendys

results.title: McDonald’s Fired Its AI. Now It’s Back With Google’s. | PYMNTS.com - Top World News Today
highlights:
McDonald’s is back in the artificial intelligence drive-thru business, and this time it’s bringing Google.
...
At its Worldwide Convention in Las Vegas last week, the company unveiled ArchIQ, a Google-powered AI ordering system already nicknamed Archy by franchisees. It also launched tests at five U.S. locations, ABC News reported Monday (June 8).
...
Meet Archy IQ – no, we are not new to AOT. In fact, we have been in this AI field for about 8 years. We sold our in-house model to IBM and moved on as it wasn’t good enough for our needs.
...
As mentioned below, I wanted to hire Google (who uses NVIDIA) to service our AOT 3 years… https://t.co/JR8QHQNyKJ pic.twitter.com/e0syxiQwre
...
The debut comes two years after McDonald’s ended a nearly three-year automated ordering partnership with IBM. It pulled the technology from more than 100 restaurants in 2024, CNBC reported at the time.
...
The system also struggled to interpret different accents and dialects, the CNBC report said, citing unnamed sources. McDonald’s framed the exit as a learning exercise, saying at the time that it remained confident voice ordering would be part of its future.
...
ArchIQ is not only an ordering tool. It also serves as both an ordering and management support system, capable of helping operators identify bottlenecks and manage day-to-day performance, AI news reported Wednesday (June 10).
...
McDonald’s CEO Chris Kempczinski said in a June 1 statement that customers shouldn’t have to choose between hospitality and speed, framing automation as complementary to service rather than a replacement for it.
...
The test sits inside McDonald’s broader growth strategy, called McDonald’s > NEXT, which Kempczinski unveiled alongside ArchIQ at the convention. The plan covers menu upgrades, restaurant design and operational efficiency, DesignRush reported Monday.
...
ArchIQ is the operational spine, and the company is not waiting for the pilot to conclude before preparing for wider deployment. Every U.S. McDonald’s location is receiving Google Edge Cloud blade installations in preparation for a broader rollout, ECIKS.org reported June 5.
...
McDonald’s digital business gives the infrastructure push additional weight. In a February earnings announcement, the company reported that systemwide sales to loyalty members across 70 markets rose 20% to nearly $37 billion in 2025, with 90-day active loyalty users up 19% to nearly 210 million at year-end.
...
An AI ordering layer that connects to loyalty data, recognizing a customer and surfacing their usual order, extends that digital relationship into the physical drive-thru lane.
...
McDonald’s has not said when ArchIQ will expand beyond the five test locations.

# Data Scientist (100%)
...
## Drive innovation in machine learning and AI, from research to deployment, creating scalable intelligent systems that power the next generation of scientific discovery.
...
Are you passionate about turning complex data into intelligent, production-ready solutions while supporting the future of open-access science? We are looking for a Data Scientist to join our team and help design, develop, and deploy advanced machine learning solutions that power intelligent, data-driven products. This role focuses on NLP, recommender systems, and agentic LLM workflows, turning complex business challenges into scalable and impactful analytical solutions.
...
This is an opportunity to work at the forefront of machine learning and AI, contributing to innovative systems that leverage state-of-the-art research in practical applications.
...
Core Responsibilities
...
Design, develop, and evaluate machine learning and statistical models, with a focus on NLP, recommender systems, and LLM-based solutions.
...
Translate business problems into data-driven approaches and scalable analytical solutions.
...
Perform data exploration, preprocessing, and feature engineering to ensure high-quality inputs for modeling.
...
Develop, optimize, and benchmark models using appropriate metrics and validation strategies.
...
Build and experiment with LLM-powered systems, including agentic workflows and RAG.
...
Investigate, reproduce, and compare research prototypes and state-of-the-art methods.
...
Collaborate with engineering teams to support the integration of models into production.
...
Monitor and analyze model performance and iterate to improve accuracy and robustness.
...
Bachelor’s degree/ Master's degree in Computer Science or related.
...
2-5 years of experience as a Data Scientist.

2–5 years of experience in Python (including complex applications), Machine Learning, and LLMs.
...
Strong background in data science, statistics, and analytical problem-solving.
...

...
Intermediate proficiency in PyTorch, TensorFlow, Scikit-learn, and Hugging Face.
...
Proficiency in Natural Language Processing (NLP), including tokenization and named entity recognition (NER).
...

results.title: Senior Data Scientist, Platform | Wfhforgeon
highlights:
Senior Data Scientist, Platform | Wfhforgeon
...
# Senior Data Scientist, Platform
...
Trust is the foundation of a vibrant Airbnb community. The Content Integrity Data Science team helps build and protect that trust by ensuring that the content on Airbnb, including listings, profiles, messages and other user-generated experiences, is accurate, authentic and aligned with our policies and community standards.
...
We partner closely with product, engineering, policy and operations teams to develop advanced AI-driven content understanding systems, scale effective human-in-the-loop workflows and proactively defend against emerging content risks, so guests and hosts can interact with confidence.
...
This role is unique in that it directly improves the safety, trust, and quality of real-world user experiences by advancing Airbnb’s ability to understand, interpret and act on content at scale. You will help shape how the platform reasons about listings, profiles, messages and other user-generated content by building the next generation of Trust Content Understanding Models.
...
- The ideal candidate is a motivated and talented “full-stack” Data Scientist with strong applied ML intuition and a bias toward impact, who can own and drive forward challenging, high-visibility initiatives such as:
...
- Advance Airbnb’s content integrity capabilities by building Natural Language Processing (NLP) and LLM-based models that understand intent, policy compliance, quality and risk across listings, profiles, and user communications
...
- Develop high-performing models for detecting problematic or misleading content, including text classification, semantic similarity, information extraction and generative model-based reasoning for policy interpretation and enforcement
...
- Design and optimize human-in-the-loop Machine Learning (ML) systems for content review, labeling, escalation and continuous model improvement
...
- Build systems to detect emerging content risks and abuse patterns across regions, cohorts and surfaces using statistical, ML and representation-learning approaches
...
- Design intelligent sampling and evaluation strategies to measure rare events, policy recall, false positives/negatives and model blind spots in large-scale content systems
...
- A Typical Day:
...
- Artificial Intelligence / Machine Learning: Build and deploy production AI/ML systems for content integrity and trust content understanding, including feature engineering, model development and evaluation, thresholding, error analysis and end-to-end model lifecycle management. This includes working with NLP and LLM-based models in real production settings.
...
- Inference: Partner with inference data scientists to conduct rigorous quantitative analyses, applying working knowledge of causal inference to interpret results, assess impact, and identify gaps and opportunities to improve content quality and trust outcomes.
...
Empowerment: Think strategically about how
...
scale and evolve Airbnb
...
s content integrity defenses,
...
long-term
...
- Your Expertise:
...
- 5+ years of industry experience in a quantitative analysis role with a Master’s degree in a quantitative field (computer science, statistics etc.), or 2+ years of experience with a Ph.D.
- State-of-the-art knowledge of AI/ML models
- Hands-on experience building, evaluating, and deploying NLP and LLM-based solutions, including text classification, information extraction, semantic understanding or generative applications.
...
- Working knowledge of causal inference
...
- Skilled in statistical programming (Python or R) and database usage (SQL)
